case_title: WENDEE VAN GIESON VS. UNITED AIR LINES, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: ATTY. NEIL BERMAN OF THE RUCKA, O'BOYLE, LOMBARDO & MCKENNA'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF WENDEE VAN GIESON IS OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH C R C 3.1362 (C).
